name: Anchoyade
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Lemon juice (or red wine vinegar)
8 To 10 slices French bread, half-inch thick, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak anchovies for 10 minutes in cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Place anchovies in a large mortar or heavy bowl with garlic and tomato paste.
3. Pound mixture with a pestle, wooden masher, or spoon until very smooth.
Alternatively, process in a food processor with steel blade.
4. Drizzle oil into the mixture a few drops at a time, stirring constantly until thick and smooth like mayonnaise.
5. Stir in lemon juice and a pinch of black pepper.
6. Preheat oven to 500°F.
7. Brown bread on one side.
8. Spread the unbrowned side with anchovy mixture using the back of a fork or spoon.
9. Bake bread for 10 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with parsley and serve immediately.
Note: For an appetizer, use whole slices of French bread spread with anchovy mixture.
